import type { StructuredPatch } from '../types.js'; /** * @param patch either a single structured patch object (as returned by `structuredPatch`) or an array of them (as returned by `parsePatch`). * @returns a new structured patch which when applied will undo the original `patch`. */ export declare function reversePatch(structuredPatch: StructuredPatch): StructuredPatch; export declare function reversePatch(structuredPatch: StructuredPatch[]): StructuredPatch[]; export declare function reversePatch(structuredPatch: StructuredPatch | StructuredPatch[]): StructuredPatch | StructuredPatch[]; //# sourceMappingURL=reverse.d.ts.map
